summary: Successfully implemented pulse jettison command with all required functionality including type auto-detection, slug generation, lineage tracking, and proper build scaffolding
decisions: Added jettison command as a subparser of the main pulse.py argparse structure
Implemented type auto-detection using keyword matching for code_build, research, content, and planning
Used j-<task>-<timestamp> format for slug generation with stopword filtering
Created basic scaffold_jettison_build function as placeholder for D1.2's implementation
Set spawn_mode to 'manual' for jettison drops to require manual launch
Included lineage tracking in meta.json with parent_slug, parent_convo, and moment fields
concerns: scaffold_jettison_build is currently a basic implementation - D1.2 should enhance it with proper lineage schema
Slug conflict resolution works but could be more elegant
Type auto-detection uses simple keyword matching - could be enhanced with more sophisticated NLP
notes_for_orchestrator: All success criteria met. Command works as expected with proper argument parsing, type detection, and launch prompt generation. Files are properly scaffolded and ready for manual launch.
